channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok Extension: Trump Delays Ban for 75 Days - The Latest Developments
item.description: President Donald Trump has signed an executive order to extend the deadline for TikTok's divestment from China, delaying the ban by 75 days. This move comes as the president seeks to negotiate a deal to keep the social media platform running in the US.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
